name: Modern Ottoman with Chrome Frame - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
This Modern Ottoman with Chrome Frame from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia is perfect for adding extra seating and style to your living room, den or family room. This upholstered ottoman features a removable cushion made from soft fabric with 100% polyester foam filling. The rectangular ottoman is set on a silver-finish, chrome-plated steel frame for eye-catching contrast, and it can also be used as a footrest in front of a sofa or chair.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy

Overall Width: 27.25 inches
Overall Height: 19 inches
Overall Depth: 17 inches
